subcodes.first_line: Concerning Jinab-i-Aqa Mírzá Ḥabíbu'lláh, the noble scion of the illustrious Áqá Riḍá, let every manner of effort be exerted [4o]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در خصوص جناب آقا میرزا حبیب الله این سلیل آقا رضای جلیل است هر قسم باشد همتی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual assemblies; administrative matters, @business; financial; property matters, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @Hands of the Cause, @personal instructions
